steps.title: Find the pasture percentage
steps.content:
Farmland comprises 48.0% of the plot, so the remaining pasture is:
$$100\% - 48\% = 52\%$$

steps.title: Calculate each region's building coverage as a percentage of the total plot
steps.content:
Farmland: Buildings cover 23.5% of the farmland, which itself is 48% of the total plot. Multiply the percentages:
$$0.235 \times 0.48 = 0.1128 = 11.28\%$$ of the total plot

Pasture: Buildings cover 16% of the pasture, which itself is 52% of the total plot.
$$0.16 \times 0.52 = 0.0832 = 8.32\%$$ of the total plot

Total buildings on the plot:
$$p = 11.28\% + 8.32\% = 19.6\%$$
